script_text: Reading a little every day is like a superpower.
The more stories and poems you read, the stronger your reading gets.
Let us see how to read all year long.
Funny ones. Scary ones. Adventure ones. Poems too!
New stories teach you new words and new ideas.
Sometimes a story has tricky words or long sentences.
That is a good thing! Growing readers try hard books.
When you need help, ask a grown-up or friend. That is smart!
Pick a time to read every day. Bedtime, after lunch, or right when you wake up.
Now you are ready to enjoy stories all year long!
